stemHtml: What is the definition of the Final Approach Point (FAP)?

options.a: The point in space on the final approach track where the intermediate approach altitude/height meets the nominal glide path or MLS elevation angle.
options.b: The point that marks the start of the intermediate approach segment of an instrument approach.
options.c: The point designed to align the aircraft with the localizer or MLS azimuth for the final approach track.
options.d: The intersection of the electronic glide path with the applicable DA/H in APV or precision approaches.
